moka-pot.title: Moka pot
moka-pot.description:
Classic 2-Cup Moka Pot - Compact Aluminum Espresso Maker

Product Description:

Brew the perfect Italian-style espresso at home with this classic 2-cup Moka Pot. Made from high-quality aluminum for even heating, it delivers a rich, bold coffee in minutes—perfect for your daily caffeine fix.

• Capacity: 2 Espresso Cups (approx. 100ml).

• Material: Durable, food-grade aluminum with a heat-resistant handle.

• Compatibility: Works on gas, electric, and ceramic stovetops.

sabrataya-copper-spirit-burner.title: Sabrataya - Traditional Copper Spirit Burner
sabrataya-copper-spirit-burner.description:
Experience the true art of slow-brewed coffee with our handcrafted Copper Spirit Burner. Designed for coffee purists, this "Sertaya" brings a vintage charm to your brewing ritual, allowing the coffee to cook slowly over a gentle flame for that perfect, rich crema.

Why It’s Special:

  • Handcrafted Excellence: Made from high-quality polished copper for durability and a classic look.

  • Slow Brewing Ritual: Perfect for use with our copper "Kanaka" to achieve the authentic Turkish coffee taste.

  • Decorative Piece: A stunning addition to any coffee corner, blending heritage with elegance.

  • Portable & Functional: Compact design that works anywhere, anytime.

Technical Details:

  • Material: 100% Solid Copper.

  • Fuel Type: Liquid Alcohol (Spirit).

  • Included: Burner base, wick, and protective cap.

kanaka-copper-coffee-pot.title: Kanaka - Handcrafted Copper Coffee Pot
kanaka-copper-coffee-pot.description:
Master the art of Turkish coffee with our Premium Copper Kanaka. Hand-forged with high-quality copper and featuring a sturdy wooden handle, this pot is designed to distribute heat evenly. This ensures your coffee brews at the perfect pace, resulting in that thick, rich "Wesh" (crema) that every coffee lover craves.

Key Features:

  • Authentic Craftsmanship: Made from solid, high-grade copper for a timeless vintage look and exceptional durability.

  • Heat Distribution: Copper is the best conductor of heat, allowing for the gentle, slow brewing essential for Turkish coffee.

  • Ergonomic Wooden Handle: Stay-cool wooden handle provides a comfortable and safe grip while brewing over the spirit burner.

  • Precision Pouring: Specially designed spout for a clean, drip-free pour into your favorite cups.

Specifications:

  • Material: 100% Solid Copper with a Natural Wood Handle.

  • Compatibility: Ideal for use with our Copper Spirit Burner (Sertaya).

  • Care: Hand wash recommended to maintain its brilliant luster.

royal-turkish-brewing-set.title: The Royal Turkish Brewing Set Handcrafted Copper Spirit Burner & Coffee Pot
royal-turkish-brewing-set.description:
Overview: Master the traditional art of slow-brewing with the Royal Turkish Brewing Set. This premium bundle brings together our handcrafted Copper Spirit Burner (Sertaya) and the matching Copper Coffee Pot (Kanaka). Designed for those who seek the ultimate coffee ritual, this set ensures a rich, flavorful cup with a perfect crema every single time.

What’s Included:

  • Handcrafted Copper Spirit Burner (Sertaya): * A vintage-inspired piece made from solid copper, providing a gentle flame for slow brewing.

  • Premium Copper Coffee Pot (Kanaka): * Expertly forged with a stay-cool wooden handle and a precision-pour spout.

  • Essential Accessories: * Includes a protective cap and a custom funnel for easy fuel refilling.

Why Buy the Set?

  • Perfectly Paired: The burner and pot are designed to work in harmony, distributing heat evenly for the best taste.

  • Timeless Aesthetic: Adds a touch of luxury and heritage to your coffee station or kitchen.

  • The Ultimate Gift: An ideal choice for coffee connoisseurs who appreciate craftsmanship and tradition.

  • Durability: Made from 100% solid, high-grade copper to last a lifetime.

Care Instructions:

To maintain the brilliant shine of your copper set, we recommend hand washing only and drying immediately with a soft cloth.

handheld-milk-frother.title: Handheld Milk Frother
handheld-milk-frother.description:
The Ultimate Tool for a Perfect Creamy Foam

Upgrade your daily coffee routine with the Elite Handheld Milk Frother. Engineered for performance and convenience, this powerful tool creates a café-quality micro-foam in seconds, giving your home-brewed coffee a professional barista touch.

Key Features:

  • USB Rechargeable: No more batteries. Equipped with a built-in rechargeable battery for long-lasting use and eco-friendly power.

  • High-Speed Motor: Delivers powerful rotation for instant, thick foam.

  • Interchangeable Whisks: Includes two stainless steel heads (Spring & Balloon) for frothing milk or whisking light ingredients.

  • Three Speed Settings: Full control over your foam texture with adjustable speed levels.

  • Sleek & Durable: Premium matte finish with a lightweight, ergonomic design for comfortable handling.

Clean & Store: Simply rinse the whisk under water. Compact enough to fit in any kitchen drawer or coffee station.

Specifications

  • Charging: USB Cable (Included)

  • Speeds: Low / Medium / High

  • Best For: Lattes, Cappuccinos, Matcha, and Hot Chocolate.
